session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report the full results including any failures. Do not fix anything - just report what you find.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check build and tests

session.assistant:
**Results: make fast-ci PASSED**
All CI checks passed successfully:
**Lint & Format Checks:** - Ruff linting: All checks passed - Format check: 1739 files already formatted - Prettier check: All matched files use Prettier code style - Markdown check: No issues - Exec reference check: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
**Type Checking:** - ty: All checks passed
**Test Results:** - Unit tests (erk): 5913 passed in 14.40s - Tests (erk-dev): 138 passed in 5.41s - Tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed in 0.82s - Tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed (with standard validation)
**Documentation Validation:** - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing: All 19 CLAUDE.md files properly paired, 0 violations
**Total: 6224 tests passed with no failures.**
